data.body:
EPIC PLAN-REVIEW round 1 = BLOCK (F1, impact 0.85): AC2 demanded post-deploy multi-day field data, not in-session verifiable. Also valid advisories: AC2 unowned, 'serious-tier' undefined, code-v2/v3 cohort ordering hazard.
REMEDIATION: (1) reframed AC2 into an IN-SESSION measurement-framework deliverable (baseline + re-runnable queries + link to deferred ticket); (2) filed deferred post-deploy measurement as task 72b6-b0d2-2f93-456d (arthrodial-slate-fallowdeer), linked discovered_from epic, parked in 'idea', with an [operator-attested] data-collection AC — explicitly OUT of epic close path; (3) added '## Definitions & Sequencing' defining serious-tier (maps to 0.9 decide.py binaries) and the code-v2 (9f25/b9c0) vs code-v3 (f32e) cohort independence. Re-running epic plan-review.
